Label: /FR-U-10/
Issue: The requirement does not specify what happens if no neural networks are available.
Correction: If no neural networks are available, the drop-down list should display a message 'No neural networks available'.

Label: /FR-U-20/
Issue: The requirement does not specify what happens if the user selects an invalid neural network.
Correction: If the user selects an invalid neural network, an error message should be displayed indicating 'Invalid neural network selected'.

Label: /FR-U-30/
Issue: The requirement does not specify the supported file formats for importing neural network topology.
Correction: Selecting 'import neural network' option opens a window for file selection from user’s device. Supported formats: ONNX.

Label: /FR-U-40/
Issue: The requirement does not specify what happens if no hardware components are available.
Correction: If no hardware components are available, the drop-down list should display a message 'No hardware components available'.

Label: /FR-U-50/
Issue: The requirement does not specify what happens if the user selects an invalid hardware component.
Correction: If the user selects an invalid hardware component, an error message should be displayed indicating 'Invalid hardware component selected'.

Label: /FR-U-60/
Issue: The requirement does not specify the supported file formats for importing images.
Correction: There will be an 'Import image' button. Clicking on it will open a window for file selection from user’s device. Supported formats: JPEG, JPG, PNG.

Label: /FR-U-80/
Issue: The requirement does not specify what happens if the inference fails.
Correction: There will be a 'Start the inference' button. Clicking on it will start the inference with the given arguments. If the inference fails, an error message should be displayed indicating 'Inference failed'.

Label: /FR-U-100/
Issue: The requirement does not specify the format of the diagnostic data.
Correction: Clicking on 'View results' button will open a pop-up window, where inference results are shown together with diagnostic data in JSON format.

Label: /FR-U-110/
Issue: The requirement does not specify the format in which results and diagnostic data are saved.
Correction: There will be an 'Export results' button. Clicking on it will save inference results and diagnostic data in JSON format on the local device.

Label: /FR-A-10/
Issue: The requirement does not specify what happens if the user interface update fails.
Correction: Each selection is visible in real-time on the user interface. According error and warning messages are shown in the run-time log if a selection is improper. If the user interface update fails, an error message should be displayed indicating 'User interface update failed'.

Label: /FR-A-30/
Issue: The requirement does not specify the types of conflicts that can occur.
Correction: Arguments are checked for validity. Any conflict, such as incompatible neural network and hardware component, is shown as an error message.

Label: /FR-A-60/
Issue: The requirement does not specify the format of the completion message.
Correction: After the inference is complete, a completion message is shown in a pop-up window and the loading animation disappears.

Label: /PD10/
Issue: The requirement does not specify the minimum height and width for input images.
Correction: The neural network receives the image(s) as input. Supported formats: JPEG, JPG, PNG. The height and width of import image(s) should be at least 224x224 pixels.

Label: /PD20/
Issue: The requirement does not specify what happens if the imported neural network is not compatible with the hardware.
Correction: Imported neural network topology should be compatible with the specified hardware. If not, an error message should be displayed indicating 'Incompatible neural network topology'.

Label: /PD30/
Issue: The requirement does not specify the format of the inference results and diagnostic data.
Correction: Will include the following five items: inference result containing confidence score, latency, hardware information, identifier (filename or name of the predefined network) of the neural network. The data will be in JSON format.

Label: /PD40/
Issue: The requirement does not specify the format of the runtime log file.
Correction: Contains detailed information about past events. Specified in /FR-A-70/. The log file will be in plain text format.

Label: /PD50/
Issue: The requirement does not specify what happens if the translation file is missing or corrupted.
Correction: The program uses translation files as text resources to display GUI texts in a language specified by the user. Supported format: Compiled Qt Linguist File (.qm file). If the translation file is missing or corrupted, an error message should be displayed indicating 'Translation file missing or corrupted'.
